data.broker_brief: Graza is a premium Spanish extra virgin olive oil brand with a cult DTC following. Known for accessible quality positioning and distinctive squeeze-bottle format.

data.email_subject: Graza — the olive oil brand your customers are already searching for
data.email_body:
Hi [Buyer Name],

I'm reaching out about Graza — the olive oil brand that's generated more organic social buzz in the past two years than any other product in the category. If your customers haven't discovered it yet, they're about to.

Founded by Andrew Benin, Graza comes in a distinctive squeeze bottle that's as functional as it is photogenic. Here's what the data shows:

• 145K Instagram + 62K TikTok followers — driven by organic consumer love, not paid influencers
• 1,240 Amazon reviews at 4.5★ — strong repeat purchase rate
• Subscribe & Save activated — proven loyalty signal
• $6M raised — well-capitalized for regional retail push
• SRP $19.99 — strong gross margin for the olive oil set
• Already in Whole Foods nationally, plus Target and Williams-Sonoma

Graza fits perfectly in the Whole Foods olive oil set — it's premium without being precious, and the squeeze bottle format drives in-store trial. I've seen strong velocity data from comparable markets.

Would love to walk you through their regional velocity story. Are you available for 20 minutes this week?

Best,
[Your name]
Independent Food Broker | [Territory]

data.email_subject: Graza — premium Spanish EVOO with proven natural channel velocity
data.email_body:
Hi [Buyer Name],

I wanted to introduce Graza for your olive oil and cooking oil category at Sprouts. Graza has redefined how Americans shop for premium olive oil — with a distinctive squeeze bottle and accessible quality positioning.

Why Graza at Sprouts:
• Single-origin Spanish EVOO harvested fresh each season
• Distinctive packaging drives trial and repeat — strong on-shelf presence
• Already in Whole Foods with proven natural channel velocity
• Non-GMO, traceable, high-quality sourcing story Sprouts shoppers appreciate
• Two SKUs: 'Sizzle' (cooking) and 'Drizzle' (finishing) — drives basket size

Happy to share regional velocity data and a category displacement analysis. Would 15 minutes work?

Best,
[Broker Name]

data.email_subject: Graza — the EVOO your shoppers already know from social media
data.email_body:
Hi [Buyer Name],

Graza is one of the most viral food brands on social media right now, and it belongs on Erewhon's shelves. It's the olive oil brand that made premium, traceable EVOO aspirational again.

Graza for Erewhon:
• Single-origin Picual olives from Jaén, Spain — traceable and seasonal
• Instagram-native brand with massive organic reach
• Premium SRP ($14–$22) with strong margin story
• Clean, non-GMO, no additives — perfect for Erewhon's discerning shoppers
• Dual-SKU 'Sizzle' + 'Drizzle' system drives meaningful basket lift

I'd love to explore whether there's a fit. Do you have 15 minutes in the next two weeks?

Best,
[Broker Name]
